title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Siemens India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Siemens India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Siemens India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!
